titleStmt.title: SII 6.1041: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 1041. (A.R. No. 332-XXXI of 1899). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . śākābdē bāṇabhūmitriśaśiparimitē śrāvaṇē pau¨rnamāsyāṁ putrō nāgē
śvarasya dhvijakulatilaka ssaṭṭidāsō budhāhē . snānā¨rtthaṁ tōyapū¨rṇaṁ harigiripatayē
śrīnṛsiṁhāya kuṁbhaṁ svēṣṭāptyai dhūpakālē pratidivasamadādvī(ṁ)jituṁ cāma
ṭham ca . śrīśakavaruṣaṁbulu 1315 gunēṁṭi śrāvaṇa pū¨rnnamayu budhavārānanu
vāraṇasikaṭakāna nāgēśvaramahāsēnāpati koḍuku saṭidāsa sandhivigrahi
tanakunu Abhīṣṭā¨rttasidhigānu śrīnarasiṁhanāthuniki nityamunnu jalakamavasara
nanu Oka tirumajyana kaḍuva dhupaAvasarānanu parimāṟānu Oka veṁjāmaramu
sama¨rppiṁcenu Iṁdulaku śrībhaṁḍāramaṁdu padmanidhi gaṁḍamāḍalu padi sama¨rppiṁci reṁ
ḍu kuṁcālu prasādaṁ vṛttigā koni jalamu teci peṭanu ciṁgunāyaka siṁginātanāyuni
ki Aḍḍanu narisināyuni koḍku jaganātanāyuniki Aḍa I kolupulaku jītanibaṁda samasya
cāmara kolupulu sānulaAṁdunuṁ beddilā gaṁgisāni kuturu Eṟasāninni saṁpradā
yaṁmaṁddu tiruvāsāni naṁccisānni Iddaṟakunu ku 2 prasādaṁ bujiṁci (Ācaṁdrā[¨rkka])
Ācaṁdrā¨rkkastayigā koluvaṁgalāru I dha¨rmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa śrīśrīśrī
Digital edition of SII 6.1041 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
